title: Wholesome Chinese Pine Nut Dan-Dan Mian
description: A grassy, fluffy, indulgent Chinese dish featuring pine nuts, wok-hei, and suitable for flexitarian-friendly diets.
instructions: Rinse and soak rice noodles as needed.
Heat a wok or large frying pan over medium-high heat. Add desired amount of oil if using.
Add pine nuts, stir-fried until golden brown and aromatic.
Shred garlic cloves finely; add to the hot pan with pickled vegetables.
Combine soy sauce and oyster sauce in a small bowl. Drizzle this mixture over the ingredients.
Fold rice noodles into the mix gradually while tossing frequently to coat evenly.
Stir in optional stir-fried garlic sesame oil if desired.
Serve hot as a side dish or main meal.
